name: exec
description: Runs an operator-supplied command and reads the base64 key from its stdout. The universal escape hatch — wraps any cloud secret CLI (aws secretsmanager get-secret-value, gcloud secrets versions access, az keyvault secret show, vault kv get, ...).

vars.name: CEV_KEY_COMMAND
vars.description: Shell command whose stdout is the base64-encoded 32-byte key. Runs with the container's identity (IAM role / Workload Identity).
